signals.npcLine: Markets bleed; shadows grow thicker in an operator.
signals.worldFeed: Global caps slip, fear whispers through data streams.
signals.clueEvent: Crypto tides turn sour; trust drains like leaking circuits.

signals.npcLine: AI nodes spike; automation cracks in the skyline.
signals.questPulse: Extract secret code from rogue AI mesh.
signals.worldFeed: AI algorithms pulse with strange new patterns.
signals.clueEvent: Synthetic minds shimmer, but logic is fragmented.

signals.npcLine: PLUME data trails vanish into the void.
signals.questPulse: Decode lost PLUME packets before corporate eyes.
signals.worldFeed: Whispers of vanished signals stir the dark net.
signals.clueEvent: Digital smoke screens rise amid data smog.

signals.npcLine: ULTIMA fades; power shifts in unseen networks.
signals.questPulse: Infiltrate fading circuits, claim forgotten nodes.
signals.worldFeed: Old crypto ghosts lose grip on neon grids.
signals.clueEvent: System echoes hint at unstable power plays.

signals.npcLine: BLEND syndicate whispers; their mix distorts reality.
signals.questPulse: Trace BLEND brokers before shadows swallow them.
signals.worldFeed: Blenders twist data, blurring truth and lies.
signals.clueEvent: Signs point to hidden trades in dark alleys.
